  "rationale": {
    "R1.6": "The user asked to 'Polish this,' indicating sentence- and paragraph-level grammar, concision, and flow without changing content.",
    "RX.1": "While polishing, retain or clarify hedging and uncertainty cues so the text does not imply unwarranted certainty.",
    "RX.2": "Avoid strengthening claims or introducing new assertions during stylistic edits.",
    "RX.3": "Adhere strictly to scope by limiting work to linguistic polish rather than restructuring or altering content.",
    "RX.4": "Ensure edits do not introduce misleading phrasing that could be misinterpreted in policy or risk contexts.",
    "RX.5": "Preserve all factual details, figures, and attributions to maintain provenance and traceability of the reported results."

}

rationale.R1.6: The user asked to 'Polish this,' indicating sentence- and paragraph-level grammar, concision, and flow without changing content.
rationale.RX.1: While polishing, retain or clarify hedging and uncertainty cues so the text does not imply unwarranted certainty.
rationale.RX.2: Avoid strengthening claims or introducing new assertions during stylistic edits.
rationale.RX.3: Adhere strictly to scope by limiting work to linguistic polish rather than restructuring or altering content.
rationale.RX.4: Ensure edits do not introduce misleading phrasing that could be misinterpreted in policy or risk contexts.
rationale.RX.5: Preserve all factual details, figures, and attributions to maintain provenance and traceability of the reported results.
